choices.title: Who are you and how did you get here?

choice.title: I'm me and I put one leg in front of the other.
choice.response: Haha, funny. What are you doing here?

choice.title: I'm trying to locate some missing entrepreneurs.
choice.response: How did you... Ahh, the guild sent you, right?

choice.title: Yuup. They seem to care a lot about these girls.
choice.response: Hah, you are such a tool.

choice.title: What do you mean?
choice.response: They don't care about the girls.

choice.title: Why did they send me here then?
choice.response: They just want to achieve post nut clarity.

choice.title: The what nut you're talking about?
choice.response: Like I said, you are such a tool.

choice.title: I'm starting to feel like a hammer now.
Now where are the girls?
choice.response: You're a nail short and a day too late.

choice.title: What are you talking about?
choice.response: The girls have been processed already.

choice.title: What do you mean by processed?
choice.response: Sliced, diced and fed to my master.

choice.title: You really are a nut I want to crack.
choice.response: Why don't you start hammering then?
